title: Better Vanilla Optimized
description: An optimized Vanilla+ experience with enhanced visuals and smooth performance.
body:
• 🔧**Optimization – Performance focused mods that make Minecraft run smoother.**

• 👑**Visuals – Enhanced character and mob designs with improved animations.**

• 🎬**YouTuber-friendly – ReplayMod, Litematica, and Simple Voice Chat included.**

• 🎧**Sounds – Cozy and immersive sound effects.**

• 🌠**Shaders – Complementary Shaders included.**

• 🌽**Farming – Crops are easier to harvest and don’t need replanting.**
